title: Dolt: This Makes SQL Feel Like Git
summary: Dolt is a SQL database that applies Git-style version control workflows, including branches, commits, diffs, merges, pull requests, and rollbacks, to structured data tables. It addresses collaboration and data version control pain points in traditional databases, with applications to ML datasets, test data, game configs, and production changes.
